# UC-15.4.6 · APC InRow Cooling SNMP Supply Air Temperature Deviation

## Description

Supply air off setpoint implies fan, coil, or control valve issues in row-based cooling.

## Value

Protects hot-aisle containment performance and ASHRAE envelopes.

## Implementation

(1) Units °F vs °C consistently. (2) Correlate with CRAH return sensors.

## SPL

```spl
index=cooling sourcetype="snmp:apc:cooling" earliest=-4h
| eval supply=tonumber(coalesce(airIRSupplyAirTemperature, supply_air_temp_f, ""))
| eval setpoint=tonumber(coalesce(airIRSetpointTemperature, supply_setpoint_f, ""))
| eval delta=abs(supply-setpoint)
| where delta>3
| timechart span=15m avg(delta) by unit_name
```

## Visualization

Line supply vs setpoint.

## References

- [Schneider Electric — APC product support](https://www.se.com/ww/en/product-category/3100-2000-pdu/)
